response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with a strong background in web technologies, Node.js, and DLang, he does not meet the core requirements for this role. The position mandates 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on the Windows platform, whereas Bogdan only has about 6 months of professional C++ experience from 2014-2015. Additionally, his recent financial domain experience at RIDE Capital utilized a web-based tech stack rather than C++ backend systems.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience, including strong CI/CD, DevOps, and TDD practices.
Exposure to investment and capital markets domain through his tenure at RIDE Capital.
Excellent communication and leadership skills demonstrated through tech workshops, open-source projects, and staff-level roles.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience.
No demonstrated experience with SQL Server or Oracle databases, relying mostly on MongoDB and MySQL.
Technology focus is heavily skewed towards full-stack web development (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than the required C++ Windows ecosystem.
